subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and firm in the Testament! That which thou didst write was noted. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت عهد راسخ پیمان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملحوظ افتاد خوشا بحال تو که
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Ottoman commissions of investigation, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
